name: St. Mary'S
description_short: St. Mary's is a private Catholic college preparatory high school in Manhasset, NY serving grades 9-12, not a financial services company.
description_long: St. Mary's High School is a private Catholic college preparatory institution located in Manhasset, New York, founded to serve students in grades 9 through 12. The school is affiliated with the Christian Brothers (FMS) tradition and operates as an independent educational institution with a strong emphasis on Catholic intellectual tradition and liberal arts education. The website clearly identifies the organization as a secondary school focused on academic preparation, spiritual formation, and character development. The school offers a comprehensive college preparatory curriculum including 14 AP courses, a challenging academic program grounded in Catholic tradition, competitive athletics across 25 varsity sports teams, and extensive extracurricular activities. The school operates a guidance program dedicated to college placement, with reported outcomes showing 99% of graduates attending college at selective institutions. The school also manages scholarship fundraising and financial aid processing for prospective students. St. Mary's distinguishes itself through its Catholic mission (expressed in the motto "Omnia Ad Jesum Per Mariam" — Everything to Jesus through Mary), its 12:1 student-teacher ratio, its athletic program highlighted by 60 years of coaching leadership, and its track record of placing students in top-tier universities with approximately $18.7-22 million in reported college scholarships. The institution maintains active alumni networks, hosts annual giving campaigns, and operates affiliated programs including an elementary school. This profile entry is fundamentally miscategorized. St. Mary's High School is an educational institution, not a financial services provider of any kind. There is no connection to payday lending, credit alternatives, personal loans, or consumer finance products. The company should not appear in any consumer finance database, as it operates entirely outside the financial services sector.
